title: labor (2)

        - these are labor pains and baby when it hurts most you gotta breathe and push
these are labor pains and baby when it hurts most you gotta breathe and push
these are labor pains and baby when it hurts most you gotta breathe and push
i know i don't know like that i'm only going by reading books
    - ))}}
        - one of them was yours you were kind enough to share
did i ever tell you how to me it looked
when you looked out and found them already out there
our children are coming you smiled
everything we do and been doing
is taking care of future humans
and for a while we just sat an imagined
that's where the magic happened
i don't mean sentimental
the vision snapped in too real to just be mental
and trust me, i felt it too
can't see your sight but i love the way it lights you
and the music you make when you try to say it out loud
that's what i ride to
what i soundtrack my life to
i'm me and i'm proud
from what i be about to what i'm about to be
i'm me and i'm proud
cuz i know the world i live in couldn't exist without me
i'm here and i'm loud
cuz in here i've been putting down things our kids could use if i could just let em go
i'm here and i'm loud
cuz i know they'll make the same mistakes we did and i'd  like to let em know
it's ok

    - ))}}

these are labor pains and baby when it hurts most you gotta breathe and push
these are labor pains and baby when it hurts most you gotta breathe and push
i know i don't know like that i'm only trying to be an open book
